headline: S&P Global to Present at Bernstein's 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on May 27, 2026
summary: Martina Cheung, President and Chief Executive Officer of S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI), will participate in Bernstein's 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on May 27, 2026 in New York, New York. Ms. Cheung is scheduled to speak from 11:00 a.m. to 11:50 a.m. (Eastern Daylight Time). The "fireside chat" will be webcast and may include forward-looking information. Mark Grant, Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Treasurer will join for investor meetings.

headline: S&P Global Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: S&P Global has lagged behind the broader market over the past year, yet analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
